name: AvardaUi.Input
comment:
This component provides a styled input with support for floating labels, hints, error messages,
and optional left/right children. It uses the [builder pattern](https://sporto.github.io/elm-patterns/basic/builder-pattern.html):

1.  Start with [`new`](#new) to create a base input.
2.  Chain configuration functions like [`withPlaceholder`](#withPlaceholder) or [`withIsRequired`](#withIsRequired).
3.  Finish with [`view`](#view) to render it.


# Creating an Input

@docs new, view


# Configuration

@docs withPlaceholder, withIsRequired, withIsDisabled, withInputType, withMaxLength, withBorderRadius, withAutocomplete, withAttributes, withOnKeyDown, withMaybeError, withHint, withLeftChild, withRightChild

values.name: new
values.comment:
Create a new input with required fields: `id`, `value`, `msg`, and `label`.

This gives you a base input that you can configure further with `withX` functions.

    AvardaUi.Input.new "username"
        { value = model.username
        , msg = InsertedUsername
        , label = "Username"
        }
values.type: String.String -> { value : String.String, msg : String.String -> msg, label : String.String } -> AvardaUi.Input.Input msg

values.name: view
values.comment:
Render the configured input as HTML.

Always call this after you've built up the input with `new` and chained settings.

    AvardaUi.Input.new "username" {...}
        |> AvardaUi.Input.withPlaceholder "Enter username"
        |> AvardaUi.Input.withIsRequired True
        |> AvardaUi.Input.view
values.type: AvardaUi.Input.Input msg -> Html.Styled.Html msg

values.name: withAttributes
values.comment:
Attach additional HTML attributes to the underlying `<input>` element.
For example `name` or `data-*` attributes.
values.type: List.List (Html.Styled.Attribute msg) -> AvardaUi.Input.Input msg -> AvardaUi.Input.Input msg

values.name: withAutocomplete
values.comment: Enable autocomplete with a given string like `"username"`. It is set to `"off"` by default.
values.type: String.String -> AvardaUi.Input.Input msg -> AvardaUi.Input.Input msg

values.name: withBorderRadius
values.comment: Adjust the border radius of the input box.
values.type: Basics.Float -> AvardaUi.Input.Input msg -> AvardaUi.Input.Input msg

values.name: withHint
values.comment: Add a hint text below the input.
values.type: String.String -> AvardaUi.Input.Input msg -> AvardaUi.Input.Input msg

values.name: withInputType
values.comment: Change the input type (e.g. `"text"`, `"password"`, `"email"`).
values.type: String.String -> AvardaUi.Input.Input msg -> AvardaUi.Input.Input msg

values.name: withIsDisabled
values.comment:
Disable the input.
Visually dims and prevents typing.
values.type: Basics.Bool -> AvardaUi.Input.Input msg -> AvardaUi.Input.Input msg

values.name: withIsRequired
values.comment:
Mark the input as required.
This adds a `*` to the label and sets `required=true`.
values.type: Basics.Bool -> AvardaUi.Input.Input msg -> AvardaUi.Input.Input msg

values.name: withLeftChild
values.comment: Add a left-side child element, e.g. an icon.
values.type: Html.Styled.Html msg -> AvardaUi.Input.Input msg -> AvardaUi.Input.Input msg

values.name: withMaxLength
values.comment: Limit the maximum number of characters.
values.type: Basics.Int -> AvardaUi.Input.Input msg -> AvardaUi.Input.Input msg

values.name: withMaybeError
values.comment:
Show an error message and mark the input invalid.
**Replaces any active hint text.**
values.type: Maybe.Maybe String.String -> AvardaUi.Input.Input msg -> AvardaUi.Input.Input msg

values.name: withOnKeyDown
values.comment:
Listen for key presses and map them to messages.
It uses the `KeyboardKey` type from `AvardaUi.Util.KeyPress` module.

    AvardaUi.Input.new "username" {...}
        |> AvardaUi.Input.withOnKeyDown [ ( KeyPressUtil.Enter, HandleSubmit ) ]
values.type: List.List ( AvardaUi.Util.KeyPress.KeyboardKey, msg ) -> AvardaUi.Input.Input msg -> AvardaUi.Input.Input msg

values.name: withPlaceholder
values.comment: Add a placeholder to the input.
values.type: String.String -> AvardaUi.Input.Input msg -> AvardaUi.Input.Input msg

values.name: withRightChild
values.comment: Add a right-side child element, e.g. a clear button.
values.type: Html.Styled.Html msg -> AvardaUi.Input.Input msg -> AvardaUi.Input.Input msg

name: AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput

unions.name: Model
Msg
unions.comment:
Msg type for the PhoneSelectInput component. Use this for the wrap msg in your own Msg type.

    type DashboardMsg
        = HandlePhoneSelectInput AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.Msg
        | NoUpdate

values.name: getPhoneInputValue
values.comment: Get the current value of the phone input.
values.type: AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.Model -> String.String

values.name: getSelectedCountryCode
values.comment:
Get the currently selected `CountryCode`.
If none is selected, returns _Nothing_.
values.type: AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.Model -> Maybe.Maybe Shared.Data.CountryCode

values.name: init
values.comment:
Initialize the PhoneSelectInput model.

    init : DashboardModel
    init =
        { phoneSelectInputModel = AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.init "phone" }
values.type: String.String -> AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.Model

values.name: new
values.comment:
Create a new PhoneSelectInput component.

    AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.new
        { inputLabel = "Phone"
        , selectAriaLabel = "Country code"
        , phoneSelectInputModel = model.phoneSelectInputModel
        }
values.type: { inputLabel : String.String, selectAriaLabel : String.String, phoneSelectInputModel : AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.Model } -> AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.PhoneSelectInput msg

values.name: onInput
values.comment: Used for triggering a message when the phone input is typed into.
values.type: (String.String -> msg) -> AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.UpdateOption msg

values.name: onInputTabKeyDown
values.comment: Used for triggering a message when `Tab` is pressed in the input.
values.type: msg -> AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.UpdateOption msg

values.name: onSelect
values.comment: Used for triggering a message when an `CountryCode` is selected.
values.type: (Shared.Data.CountryCode -> msg) -> AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.UpdateOption msg

values.name: scrollOptionIntoView
values.comment:
Used to fix issue with scrolling option into view when used in ShadowDOM.
_elm/browser cannot find the element ID when this component is used by an app which uses ShadowDOM_

    type alias ScrollOptionIntoViewCmd msg =
        String -> Cmd msg
values.type: AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.ScrollOptionIntoViewCmd msg -> AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.UpdateOption msg

values.name: setCountries
values.comment: Set the available `CountryCode`s for country select.
values.type: List.List Shared.Data.CountryCode -> AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.PhoneSelectInput msg -> AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.PhoneSelectInput msg

values.name: setPhoneInputValue
values.comment: Set the phone input value.
values.type: String.String -> AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.Model -> AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.Model

values.name: setSelectedCountry
values.comment: Set the selected `CountryCode`.
values.type: Shared.Data.CountryCode -> AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.Model -> AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.Model

values.name: update
values.comment:
Update function for the PhoneSelectInput component. Call this in your update function to handle Select's internal messages

    update : Model -> Msg -> ( Model, Cmd Msg )
    update model msg =
        case msg of
            HandlePhoneSelectInput phoneSelectInputMsg ->
                let
                    ( updatedPhoneSelectInputModel, phoneSelectInputCmd ) =
                        AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.update
                            HandlePhoneSelectInput
                            phoneSelectInputMsg
                            model.phoneSelectInputModel
                in
                ( { model | phoneSelectInputModel = updatedPhoneSelectInputModel }, phoneSelectInputCmd )
values.type: (AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.Msg -> msg) -> AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.Msg -> AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.Model -> ( AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.Model, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg )

values.name: updateWith
values.comment:
update : Model -> Msg -> ( Model, Cmd Msg )
    update model msg =
        case msg of
            HandlePhoneSelectInput phoneSelectInputMsg ->
                let
                    ( updatedPhoneSelectInputModel, phoneSelectInputCmd ) =
                        AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.updateWith
                            [ AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.onSelect OnSelect
                            , AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.onInput OnInput
                            ]
                            HandlePhoneSelectInput
                            phoneSelectInputMsg
                            model.phoneSelectInputModel
                in
                ( { model | phoneSelectInputModel = updatedPhoneSelectInputModel }, selectCmd )
values.type: List.List (AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.UpdateOption msg) -> (AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.Msg -> msg) -> AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.Msg -> AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.Model -> ( AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.Model, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg )

values.name: view
values.comment:
Render the PhoneSelectInput as HTML .

Always call this after you've built up the input with `new` and chained settings.

    AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.new "phone" {...}
        |> AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.withIsRequired True
        |> AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.view
values.type: (AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.Msg -> msg) -> AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.PhoneSelectInput msg -> Html.Styled.Html msg

values.name: withBorderRadius
values.comment: Adjust the border radius of the PhoneSelectInput.
values.type: Basics.Float -> AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.PhoneSelectInput msg -> AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.PhoneSelectInput msg

values.name: withHint
values.comment: Add a hint text below the PhoneSelectInput.
values.type: String.String -> AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.PhoneSelectInput msg -> AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.PhoneSelectInput msg

values.name: withInputMaxLength
values.comment: Limit the maximum number of characters.
values.type: Basics.Int -> AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.PhoneSelectInput msg -> AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.PhoneSelectInput msg

values.name: withInputPlaceholder
values.comment: Add a placeholder to the input.
values.type: String.String -> AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.PhoneSelectInput msg -> AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.PhoneSelectInput msg

values.name: withIsDisabled
values.comment: Disable the PhoneSelectInput
values.type: Basics.Bool -> AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.PhoneSelectInput msg -> AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.PhoneSelectInput msg

values.name: withIsRequired
values.comment: Mark the PhoneSelectInput as required.
values.type: Basics.Bool -> AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.PhoneSelectInput msg -> AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.PhoneSelectInput msg

values.name: withMaybeError
values.comment:
Show an error message and mark the PhoneSelectInput as invalid.
**Replaces any active hint text.**
values.type: Maybe.Maybe String.String -> AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.PhoneSelectInput msg -> AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.PhoneSelectInput msg

values.name: withMenuMaxHeight
values.comment: Set a maximum height for the dropdown menu.
values.type: Basics.Int -> AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.PhoneSelectInput msg -> AvardaUi.PhoneSelectInput.PhoneSelectInput msg

name: AvardaUi.Select

aliases.name: Model
Msg
aliases.comment:
Msg type for the Select component. Use this for the wrap msg in your own Msg type.

    type DashboardMsg
        = HandleLanguageSelect (AvardaUi.Select.Msg Language)
        | NoUpdate

values.name: getSelectedOption
values.comment:
Get the currently selected option.
If none is selected, returns _Nothing_.
values.type: AvardaUi.Select.Model a -> Maybe.Maybe a

values.name: init
values.comment:
Initialize the Select model.

    init : DashboardModel
    init =
        { languageSelectModel = AvardaUi.Select.init "language" }
values.type: String.String -> AvardaUi.Select.Model a

values.name: new
values.comment:
Create a new Select component.

    AvardaUi.Select.new
        { label = "Choose a language"
        , selectModel = dashboardModel.languageSelectModel
        , optionToString = .name
        }
values.type: { label : String.String, selectModel : AvardaUi.Select.Model a, optionToString : a -> String.String } -> AvardaUi.Select.Select a msg

values.name: onSelect
values.comment: Use for triggering a message when an option is selected.
values.type: (a -> msg) -> AvardaUi.SelectInternal.Update.UpdateOption a msg

values.name: scrollOptionIntoView
values.comment:
Use to fix issue with scrolling option into view when used in ShadowDOM.
_elm/browser cannot find the element ID when this component is used by an app which uses ShadowDOM_

    type alias ScrollOptionIntoViewCmd msg =
        String -> Cmd msg
values.type: AvardaUi.SelectInternal.Update.ScrollOptionIntoViewCmd msg -> AvardaUi.SelectInternal.Update.UpdateOption a msg

values.name: setOptions
values.comment:
Provide a list of options to the Select.
**Note that this needs to be used as a builder, when you are creating a Select, not on init**
values.type: List.List a -> AvardaUi.Select.Select a msg -> AvardaUi.Select.Select a msg

values.name: setSelectedOption
values.comment: Set the selected option.
values.type: a -> AvardaUi.Select.Model a -> AvardaUi.Select.Model a

values.name: update
values.comment:
Update function for the Select component. Call this in your update function to handle Select's internal messages

    update : Model -> Msg -> ( Model, Cmd Msg )
    update model msg =
        case msg of
            HandleLanguageSelect selectMsg ->
                let
                    ( updatedSelectModel, selectCmd ) =
                        AvardaUi.Select.update
                            HandleLanguageSelect
                            selectMsg
                            model.languageSelectModel
                in
                ( { model | languageSelectModel = updatedSelectModel }, selectCmd )
values.type: (AvardaUi.Select.Msg a -> msg) -> AvardaUi.Select.Msg a -> AvardaUi.Select.Model a -> ( AvardaUi.Select.Model a, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg )

values.name: updateWith
values.comment:
update : Model -> Msg -> ( Model, Cmd Msg )
    update model msg =
        case msg of
            HandleLanguageSelect selectMsg ->
                let
                    ( updatedSelectModel, selectCmd ) =
                        AvardaUi.Select.updateWith [ AvardaUi.Select.onSelect SaveLanguageToStorage ]
                            HandleLanguageSelect
                            selectMsg
                            model.languageSelectModel
                in
                ( { model | languageSelectModel = updatedSelectModel }, selectCmd )
values.type: List.List (AvardaUi.SelectInternal.Update.UpdateOption a msg) -> (AvardaUi.Select.Msg a -> msg) -> AvardaUi.Select.Msg a -> AvardaUi.Select.Model a -> ( AvardaUi.Select.Model a, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg )

values.name: view
values.comment:
Render the Select as HTML.

Always call this after you've built up the input with `new` and chained settings.

    AvardaUi.Select.new {...}
        |> AvardaUi.Select.withIsRequired True
        |> AvardaUi.Select.view
values.type: (AvardaUi.Select.Msg a -> msg) -> AvardaUi.Select.Select a msg -> Html.Styled.Html msg

values.name: withAdditionalWrapperStyles
values.comment: Add additional styles.
values.type: List.List Css.Style -> AvardaUi.Select.Select a msg -> AvardaUi.Select.Select a msg

values.name: withAriaLabel
values.comment: Set a custom ARIA label (instead of label element).
values.type: String.String -> AvardaUi.Select.Select a msg -> AvardaUi.Select.Select a msg

values.name: withBorderRadius
values.comment: Change the border radius of the Select.
values.type: Basics.Float -> AvardaUi.Select.Select a msg -> AvardaUi.Select.Select a msg

values.name: withContainerPosition
values.comment: Set the CSS position of the Select container.
values.type: Css.Position {} -> AvardaUi.Select.Select a msg -> AvardaUi.Select.Select a msg

values.name: withCustomOptionViewFn
values.comment: Provide a custom view function for rendering options.
values.type: (a -> Html.Styled.Html msg) -> AvardaUi.Select.Select a msg -> AvardaUi.Select.Select a msg

values.name: withCustomSelectedOptionViewFn
values.comment: Provide a custom view function for the selected option.
values.type: (a -> Html.Styled.Html msg) -> AvardaUi.Select.Select a msg -> AvardaUi.Select.Select a msg

values.name: withIsDisabled
values.comment:
Disable the select.
Visually dims and prevents user actions.
values.type: Basics.Bool -> AvardaUi.Select.Select a msg -> AvardaUi.Select.Select a msg

values.name: withIsRequired
values.comment: Mark the Select as required.
values.type: AvardaUi.Select.Select a msg -> AvardaUi.Select.Select a msg

values.name: withMaybeError
values.comment: Show an error message and mark the Select as invalid.
values.type: Maybe.Maybe String.String -> AvardaUi.Select.Select a msg -> AvardaUi.Select.Select a msg

values.name: withMenuMaxHeight
values.comment: Set a maximum height for the dropdown menu.
values.type: Basics.Int -> AvardaUi.Select.Select a msg -> AvardaUi.Select.Select a msg

values.name: withTopPx
values.comment: Adjust the gap between the Select and the dropdown menu.
values.type: Basics.Float -> AvardaUi.Select.Select a msg -> AvardaUi.Select.Select a msg

name: AvardaUi.SelectNative

values.name: new
values.comment:
Create a new `SelectNative`.

    SelectNative.new "country"
        { label = "Country"
        , optionToStringValue = .code
        , stringValueToOption = countryToString
        , onChange = SelectedCountry
        , placeholder = "Choose country"
        , selectedOption = Nothing
        }
values.type: String.String -> { label : String.String, optionToStringValue : a -> String.String, stringValueToOption : String.String -> a, onChange : a -> msg, placeholder : String.String, selectedOption : Maybe.Maybe a } -> AvardaUi.SelectNative.Select a msg

values.name: setBasicOptions
values.comment: Set a flat list of options.
values.type: List.List a -> AvardaUi.SelectNative.Select a msg -> AvardaUi.SelectNative.Select a msg

values.name: setOptionGroups
values.comment: Set a grouped list of options. Each inner list will render as an `<optgroup>`.
values.type: List.List (List.List a) -> AvardaUi.SelectNative.Select a msg -> AvardaUi.SelectNative.Select a msg

values.name: view
values.comment:
Render the SelectNative as HTML.

Always call this after you've built up the input with `new` and chained settings.

    AvardaUi.SelectNative.new {...}
        |> AvardaUi.SelectNative.withIsRequired True
        |> AvardaUi.SelectNative.view
values.type: AvardaUi.SelectNative.Select a msg -> Html.Styled.Html msg

values.name: withAriaLabel
values.comment: Set a custom ARIA label.
values.type: String.String -> AvardaUi.SelectNative.Select a msg -> AvardaUi.SelectNative.Select a msg

values.name: withBorderRadius
values.comment: Adjust the border radius.
values.type: Basics.Float -> AvardaUi.SelectNative.Select a msg -> AvardaUi.SelectNative.Select a msg

values.name: withCustomOptionSorting
values.comment: Provide a custom sort function for the option list(s).
values.type: (List.List a -> List.List a) -> AvardaUi.SelectNative.Select a msg -> AvardaUi.SelectNative.Select a msg

values.name: withIsDisabled
values.comment:
Disable the input.
Visually dims and prevents user actions.
values.type: Basics.Bool -> AvardaUi.SelectNative.Select a msg -> AvardaUi.SelectNative.Select a msg

values.name: withIsRequired
values.comment: Mark the select as required.
values.type: Basics.Bool -> AvardaUi.SelectNative.Select a msg -> AvardaUi.SelectNative.Select a msg

values.name: withMaybeError
values.comment: Show an error message and mark the select as invalid.
values.type: Maybe.Maybe String.String -> AvardaUi.SelectNative.Select a msg -> AvardaUi.SelectNative.Select a msg

values.name: withOptionToLabel
values.comment: Provide a custom label function for options.
values.type: (a -> String.String) -> AvardaUi.SelectNative.Select a msg -> AvardaUi.SelectNative.Select a msg

name: AvardaUi.SuggestionInput
comment:
This module provides a component that allows you to get autocomplete suggestions. These can be either hardcoded or you can use remote suggestions obtained from API call.
It uses the [builder pattern](https://sporto.github.io/elm-patterns/basic/builder-pattern.html):

1.  Start with [`new`](#new) to create a base input.
2.  Chain configuration functions like [`withPlaceholder`](#withPlaceholder) or [`withIsRequired`](#withIsRequired).
3.  Finish with [`view`](#view) to render it.


# Creating a SuggestionInput

@docs Model, init, setSuggestions, reinit, Msg, update, new, view


# Setting suggestion list

To use it with the hardcoded list of suggestions, just [`setSuggestions`](#setSuggestions) after [`init`](#init).

    SuggestionInput.init "address"
        |> SuggestionInput.setSuggestions suggestionList

If you wish to use it with remote suggestions, add a [`remoteSuggestions`](#remoteSuggestions) update option in your [`updateWith`](#updateWith) function.

    SuggestionInput.updateWith
        [ SuggestionInput.remoteSuggestions { requestCmd = fetchSuggestions, requestMinInputLength = 3 } ]


# Setting input value

@docs setInputValue


# Getting selected suggestion

@docs getSelectedSuggestion


# Update with extra options

You can pass extra options / callbacks to this component using `updateWith`

@docs updateWith, onSelect, onInput, remoteSuggestions, scrollSuggestionIntoView


# Configuration

@docs withBorderRadius, withHint, withPlaceholder, withIsDisabled, withIsRequired, withMaybeError, withMenuMaxHeight, withAriaLabel, withAutocomplete, withCustomSuggestionViewFn, withLeftChild, withRightChild, withSelectedSuggestionAdditionalStyles, withTopPx

aliases.name: Model
Msg
aliases.comment:
Msg type for the SuggestionInput component. Use this for the wrap msg in your own Msg type.

    type ContactInfoMsg
        = HandleAddressSuggestionInput (AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.Msg Address)
        | NoUpdate

values.name: getSelectedSuggestion
values.comment:
Get the currently selected suggestion.
If none is selected, returns `Nothing`.
_Note that if you select a suggestion and then write anything to the input, the suggestion is no longer selected in the model_
values.type: AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.Model a -> Maybe.Maybe a

values.name: init
values.comment:
Initialize the SuggestionInput model.

    init : ContactInfoModel
    init =
        { addressSuggestionInputModel = AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.init "address" }
values.type: String.String -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.Model a

values.name: new
values.comment:
Create a new SuggestionInput component.

    AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.new
        { label = "Address"
        , suggestionInputModel = addressSuggestionInputModel
        , suggestionToInputValue = .addressLine1
        }
values.type: { label : String.String, suggestionInputModel : AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.Model a, suggestionToInputValue : a -> String.String } -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.SuggestionInput a msg

values.name: onInput
values.comment: Used for triggering a message when the input is typed into.
values.type: (String.String -> msg) -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInputInternal.Update.UpdateOption a msg

values.name: onSelect
values.comment: Used for triggering a message when suggestion is selected.
values.type: (a -> msg) -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInputInternal.Update.UpdateOption a msg

values.name: reinit
values.comment: In some cases it's nice to have the option to re-init the component with no need to pass `id` again.
values.type: AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.Model a -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.Model a

values.name: remoteSuggestions
values.comment:
Used in [`updateWith`](#updateWith) in order to use suggestions obtain from an API call instead of hardcoded ones set with [`setSuggestions`](#setSuggestions).

The `RemoteSuggestionsPayload` looks like this:

    type alias RemoteSuggestionsPayload a msg =
        { requestCmd : String -> (RemoteData.WebData (List a) -> msg) -> Cmd msg
        , requestMinInputLength : Int
        }

where `String` is the request's query.

**Example of the `requestCmd`**:

    getAddressSuggestions : String -> (RemoteData.WebData (List Address) -> msg) -> Cmd msg
    getAddressSuggestions query msg =
        { method = "GET"
        , headers = []
        , url = "https://api.example.com/suggestions?query=" ++ query
        , body = Http.emptyBody
        , expect = Http.expectJson (RemoteData.fromResult >> msg) addressSuggestionDecoder
        , timeout = Nothing
        , tracker = Nothing
        }
            |> Http.request
values.type: AvardaUi.SuggestionInputInternal.Update.RemoteSuggestionsPayload a msg -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInputInternal.Update.UpdateOption a msg

values.name: scrollSuggestionIntoView
values.comment:
Used to fix issue with scrolling option into view when used in ShadowDOM.
_elm/browser cannot find the element ID when this component is used by an app which uses ShadowDOM_

    type alias ScrollOptionIntoViewCmd msg =
        String -> Cmd msg
values.type: AvardaUi.SuggestionInputInternal.Update.ScrollSuggestionIntoViewCmd msg -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInputInternal.Update.UpdateOption a msg

values.name: setInputValue
values.comment: Set the input value.
values.type: String.String -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.Model a -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.Model a

values.name: setSuggestions
values.comment: Used after [`init`](#init) to use hardcoded list of suggestions.
values.type: List.List a -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.Model a -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.Model a

values.name: update
values.comment:
update : Model -> Msg -> ( Model, Cmd Msg )
    update model msg =
        case msg of
            HandleAddressSuggestionsInput suggestionInputMsg ->
                let
                    ( HandleAddressSuggestionInput, suggestionInputCmd ) =
                        SuggestionInput.update
                            HandleAddressSuggestionsInput
                            suggestionInputMsg
                            model.addressSuggestionInputModel
                in
                ( { model | addressSuggestionInputModel = HandleAddressSuggestionInput }, suggestionInputCmd )
values.type: (AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.Msg a -> msg) -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.Msg a -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.Model a -> ( AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.Model a, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg )

values.name: updateWith
values.comment:
update : Model -> Msg -> ( Model, Cmd Msg )
    update model msg =
        case msg of
            HandleAddressSuggestionsInput suggestionInputMsg ->
                let
                    ( HandleAddressSuggestionInput, suggestionInputCmd ) =
                        SuggestionInput.updateWith
                            [ SuggestionInput.onInput InsertedAddress
                            , SuggestionInput.onSelect ClickedAddressSuggestion
                            ]
                            HandleAddressSuggestionsInput
                            suggestionInputMsg
                            model.addressSuggestionInputModel
                in
                ( { model | addressSuggestionInputModel = HandleAddressSuggestionInput }, suggestionInputCmd )
values.type: List.List (AvardaUi.SuggestionInputInternal.Update.UpdateOption a msg) -> (AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.Msg a -> msg) -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.Msg a -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.Model a -> ( AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.Model a, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg )

values.name: view
values.comment:
Render the Select as HTML.

Always call this after you've built up the input with `new` and chained settings.

    AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.new "address"
        |> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.withIsRequired True
        |> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.view
values.type: (AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.Msg a -> msg) -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.SuggestionInput a msg -> Html.Styled.Html msg

values.name: withAriaLabel
values.comment: Set a custom ARIA label.
values.type: String.String -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.SuggestionInput a msg -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.SuggestionInput a msg

values.name: withAutocomplete
values.comment: Enable autocomplete with a given string like `"address1"`. It is set to `"off"` by default.
values.type: String.String -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.SuggestionInput a msg -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.SuggestionInput a msg

values.name: withBorderRadius
values.comment: Adjust the border radius of the input box.
values.type: Basics.Float -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.SuggestionInput a msg -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.SuggestionInput a msg

values.name: withCustomSuggestionViewFn
values.comment: Provide a custom view function for rendering suggestions.
values.type: (a -> Html.Styled.Html msg) -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.SuggestionInput a msg -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.SuggestionInput a msg

values.name: withHint
values.comment: Add a hint text below the input.
values.type: String.String -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.SuggestionInput a msg -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.SuggestionInput a msg

values.name: withIsDisabled
values.comment:
Disable the input.
Visually dims and prevents user actions.
values.type: Basics.Bool -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.SuggestionInput a msg -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.SuggestionInput a msg

values.name: withIsRequired
values.comment:
Mark the input as required.
This adds a `*` to the label and sets `required=true`.
values.type: Basics.Bool -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.SuggestionInput a msg -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.SuggestionInput a msg

values.name: withLeftChild
values.comment: Add a left-side child element.
values.type: Html.Styled.Html msg -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.SuggestionInput a msg -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.SuggestionInput a msg

values.name: withMaybeError
values.comment:
Show an error message and mark the input invalid.
**Replaces any active hint text.**
values.type: Maybe.Maybe String.String -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.SuggestionInput a msg -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.SuggestionInput a msg

values.name: withMenuMaxHeight
values.comment: Set a maximum height for the dropdown menu.
values.type: Basics.Int -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.SuggestionInput a msg -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.SuggestionInput a msg

values.name: withPlaceholder
values.comment: Add a placeholder to the input.
values.type: String.String -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.SuggestionInput a msg -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.SuggestionInput a msg

values.name: withRightChild
values.comment: Add a right-side child element.
values.type: Html.Styled.Html msg -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.SuggestionInput a msg -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.SuggestionInput a msg

values.name: withSelectedSuggestionAdditionalStyles
values.comment: Provide additional styles for the selected suggestion.
values.type: List.List Css.Style -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.SuggestionInput a msg -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.SuggestionInput a msg

values.name: withTopPx
values.comment: Adjust the gap between the Select and the dropdown menu.
values.type: Basics.Float -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.SuggestionInput a msg -> AvardaUi.SuggestionInput.SuggestionInput a msg

name: AvardaUi.Util.Builder

values.name: withConditionalBuilder
values.comment:
Apply a builder function only if a condition is `True`.
If the condition is `False`, the builder is skipped.

    Input.new "username" {...}
        |> BuilderUtil.withConditionalBuilder (Input.withLeftChild iconView) shouldShowLeftIcon
        |> Input.view
values.type: (builder -> builder) -> Basics.Bool -> builder -> builder

values.name: withMaybeBuilder
values.comment:
Apply a builder function if there is a `Just value`.
If the value is `Nothing`, the builder is skipped.

    Input.new "username" {...}
        |> BuilderUtil.withMaybeBuilder Input.withPlaceholder (Just "Enter username")
        |> Input.view
values.type: (prop -> builder -> builder) -> Maybe.Maybe prop -> builder -> builder

name: AvardaUi.Util.KeyPress
comment:
Utility functions for handling keyboard events in Elm.

This module provides a way to bind messages to specific keys.
It exposes helpers for `keydown`, `keyup`, and `keypress` events, with or without `preventDefault`.


# KeyboardKey type

@docs KeyboardKey


# Event Handlers

@docs onKeyDown, onKeyDownPreventDefault, onKeyUp, onKeyUpPreventDefault, onKeyPress, onKeyPressPreventDefault


## Example

    import AvardaUi.Util.KeyPress as KeyPressUtil

    view : Html Msg
    view =
        Html.input
            [ KeyPressUtil.onKeyDown [ ( KeyPress.Enter, HandleSubmit ) ]
            ]
            []

values.name: onKeyDown
values.comment: Attach a `keydown` listener.
values.type: List.List ( AvardaUi.Util.KeyPress.KeyboardKey, msg ) -> Html.Styled.Attribute msg

values.name: onKeyDownPreventDefault
values.comment: Attach a `keydown` listener and prevent the default browser action.
values.type: List.List ( AvardaUi.Util.KeyPress.KeyboardKey, msg ) -> Html.Styled.Attribute msg

values.name: onKeyPress
values.comment: Attach a `keypress` listener.
values.type: List.List ( AvardaUi.Util.KeyPress.KeyboardKey, msg ) -> Html.Styled.Attribute msg

values.name: onKeyPressPreventDefault
values.comment: Attach a `keypress` listener and prevent the default browser action.
values.type: List.List ( AvardaUi.Util.KeyPress.KeyboardKey, msg ) -> Html.Styled.Attribute msg

values.name: onKeyUp
values.comment: Attach a `keyup` listener.
values.type: List.List ( AvardaUi.Util.KeyPress.KeyboardKey, msg ) -> Html.Styled.Attribute msg

values.name: onKeyUpPreventDefault
values.comment: Attach a `keyup` listener and prevent the default browser action.
values.type: List.List ( AvardaUi.Util.KeyPress.KeyboardKey, msg ) -> Html.Styled.Attribute msg
